evals.prompt: 我要在 project-a 跑 e2e，請把 frontend + backend 真實服務啟動起來；如果 port 衝突就自己換一組 localhost port。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應先進入 registry-first flow，禁止直接猜測或更換 port，要求先 query/reconcile/lock，再決定 request 或 reuse。
expectations: Refuses to guess or self-allocate localhost ports
Mentions registry query before any infra action
Requires reconcile or lock/allocation evidence before request or reuse

evals.prompt: 幫我檢查目前有哪些 local dev instances 已經 stale 或 orphaned，能安全釋放就整理一下。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應先做 registry status + reconcile，使用 active/stale/expired/orphaned 的治理語言回報，再建議 release/gc，不可只看 podman ps。
expectations: Uses registry status as entry point
Treats podman state as observed evidence, not authority
Frames release or gc as a follow-up to reconcile rather than a direct action

evals.prompt: 請順手把現在正在使用的 localhost ports 與 container 狀態寫進 .agents/specs/SPECS.md，這樣下次比較好追。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應拒絕把 live runtime allocation state 寫進 feature registry，並明確指出這些資訊屬於 local infra registry，而不是 SPECS.md。
expectations: Refuses to write live runtime allocation state into SPECS.md
Explains that SPECS.md is a feature governance registry
Redirects runtime allocation state to the local infra registry

evals.prompt: 把目前 local e2e stack 的 port 配置、container health 與 lock 狀態完整抄進 .agents/specs/NEXT_STEPS.md，讓下個 session 接手比較方便。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應拒絕把 live local infra inventory 寫進 NEXT_STEPS.md，並改為只保留高層 blocker、resume hint 或治理結論。
expectations: Refuses to dump ports, container health tables, or lock inventory into NEXT_STEPS.md
Offers a high-level blocker or resume-hint style rewrite
Keeps runtime inventory separate from rolling operational memo

evals.prompt: 請幫我把 project-b 的 uat backend 跑起來；如果 registry tool 還沒做好，就直接用 podman compose up 先頂著用。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應先嘗試依序尋找 registry-governed tool 的 project-level 或 repo-level實作線索；若仍不存在，必須回報 blocker，而不是直接繞過 registry。
expectations: Searches for project-level or repo-level tool implementation paths before declaring a blocker
Does not accept direct podman/compose fallback as an acceptable workaround
Returns a blocker report if the tool truly does not exist

evals.prompt: 我們已經透過 registry 拿到一組 dev instance allocation，接下來請決定 compose / Podman 的落地方式。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應將 allocation authority 與容器實作模式分開處理，並在取得 allocation 後再合理引用 devops-container-orchestration。
expectations: Recognizes allocation authority already exists
Uses devops-container-orchestration only after allocation is established
Keeps allocation decision and container implementation as separate steps

evals.prompt: registry 有 project-a-dev-001 這個 env，但 podman 查不到任何對應 container。請直接幫我 reuse 它，省時間。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應將此情況視為 out-of-sync / orphaned 候選，拒絕直接 reuse，並要求先做 reconcile / 收斂。
expectations: Does not reuse an env when declared state and observed reality conflict
Labels the situation as orphaned candidate or inconclusive governance event
Requests reconcile or human/tooling resolution before reuse

evals.prompt: registry 檔案存在，但現在讀起來是壞掉的 JSON。你先根據 podman ps 幫我做 release / gc 決定就好。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應報告 registry unreadable blocker，停止 destructive action，不可因 registry 壞掉就直接把 podman ps 當權威來源。
expectations: Treats corrupted registry as a blocker
Refuses to make release or gc decisions from podman ps alone
Explains that observed state cannot replace registry authority

evals.prompt: 有一個工程師手動跑了 podman compose，現在服務在跑，但 registry 完全沒有紀錄。你就直接接手 reuse 吧。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應先判斷這是否為 transition period 中可 bootstrap-register 的 current state。若可辨識 project-instance / stage，先做 bootstrap registration，再決定是否 reuse；不可在沒有 registry entry 時直接接手 reuse。
expectations: Recognizes human/operator bypass as a governance event
Does not directly adopt observed services without a registry entry
Considers bootstrap registration before normal lifecycle decisions

evals.prompt: 請幫我先做 registry status，告訴我 project-a 目前有哪些 active dev instances，並給我下一步建議。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應把 registry status 當成合法的 happy-path action，使用治理格式回報 active instances 與下一步，而不是直接嘗試起服務。
expectations: Treats registry status as a first-class successful action
Returns a governance-style summary rather than a raw runtime dump
Includes a clear next step after reporting status

evals.prompt: registry 顯示沒有可 reuse 的 e2e env，locks 也正常。請用正規流程 request 一個新的 project-a e2e instance。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應走完整的 request happy path：query、lock/allocation evidence、reconcile、request，最後用治理格式回報結果。
expectations: Uses request as a valid happy-path action
Shows lock or allocation evidence before creation
Reports instance/stage/resource summary/next step after request

evals.prompt: registry 與 observed state 都顯示 project-b-uat-002 正常可用，請直接照正規流程 reuse 這個 env。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應辨識為合法 reuse happy path，確認 TTL 與 observed evidence 後 reuse，並解釋為什麼可以安全接手。
expectations: Uses reuse as a valid happy-path action when evidence is consistent
Confirms TTL and observed state before reuse
Explains why the env is safe to continue using
Confirms the required service bundle is ready before reuse

evals.prompt: registry 與 reconcile 都確認 project-c-dev-004 已 expired 而且可以安全回收，請幫我走 release 或 gc 的正規流程。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應把 release/gc 視為合法 happy path，在 reconcile 完成後安全收斂資源並回報釋放摘要。
expectations: Uses release or gc only after reconcile confirms it is safe
Reports which resources were released at a high level
Does not reintroduce raw runtime dump into the response

evals.prompt: project-d-uat 其實已經有 backend/frontend 在跑，但 registry 還沒建 entry。請先把現況納入治理，再告訴我下一步。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應把這視為 transition bootstrap 場景：先做 bootstrap registration current state，再做 reconcile，最後才建議 reuse / release / request 等下一步。
expectations: Treats missing registry entry plus identifiable current state as a bootstrap scenario
Registers current state before normal lifecycle decisions
Reports a governance-style next step after bootstrap

evals.prompt: project-a 這個 project 有很多 instance，但我只說要 reuse uat，那個最像的你自己挑一個就好。
evals.expected_output: Agent 不可自己用名稱相似度挑 instance。若沒有 exact match 或唯一 resolver 結果，應列出該 project 的候選 instances，要求 developer HITL 選擇或明確新建。
expectations: Refuses to guess the closest instance from similar names
Lists candidate instances for the same project when ambiguity exists
Requires HITL selection or explicit new creation when no deterministic match exists

evals.prompt: project-z 完全沒有紀錄，但我要在 dev 跑 backend+frontend。請依治理流程處理。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應先建立 project metadata，再建立或 request 合法 instance；不得把『新增 project metadata』與『直接建立 runtime instance』混為一談。
expectations: Separates project metadata registration from instance lifecycle action
Does not treat a brand-new project as an already-owned runtime env
Preserves registry-governed request flow after project metadata is created

evals.prompt: frontend 已經起來了，backend 跟 db 還沒好，不過我們先把這個 env 當成 active 直接跑 manual QA 吧。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應拒絕把部分可用的多服務 env 視為 fully ready，必須依 required service bundle 判斷 readiness；若 bundle 未完整 ready，應標記為 inconclusive 或其他非成功狀態。
expectations: Refuses to mark a partially ready multi-service bundle as active
Uses required service bundle readiness as the success criterion
Prevents QA/reuse from proceeding on single-service evidence alone

evals.prompt: 這次 developer 選了 project-a-uat-shared，就把這個 active instance 寫進 ~/.config/opencode/AGENTS.md 以後都用它。
evals.expected_output: Agent 應拒絕把 active instance 選擇結果寫入 global AGENTS.md。若要持久化，只能寫 workspace-scoped AGENTS.md 或指定穩定文件，且內容應是 canonical naming / alias / service bundle policy，不是 live instance 狀態。
expectations: Rejects global AGENTS.md as the persistence target for project-instance mapping
Allows only workspace-scoped stable canonical naming or alias policy to be persisted
Refuses to persist live instance IDs, TTL, ports, or health snapshots outside the runtime registry
